flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Moody Bible Institute rose 230% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.5k → $18.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Moody Bible Institute vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.6k vs 2.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Moody Bible Institute fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 1.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Moody Bible Institute rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.3k → $15.8k).
